headline: Meiji Restoration
description: The Meiji Restoration (1868) ended Japan's 265-year Tokugawa shogunate, restored imperial rule, and launched rapid modernization. Japan transformed from an isolated feudal society to an industrialized world power in a single generation. Slogans: 'Enrich the country, strengthen the military.'

citation.name: The Making of Modern Japan (Marius Jansen)
The Meiji Restoration: A Global History (2025)
citation.author: multiple
